summary: Comprehensive testing of AIS Data Extractor v2 completed successfully. Verified REAL MarineTraffic data integration with 5173 vessels, all frontend functionality working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Manual extraction times out due to real MarineTraffic scraping taking 30+ seconds
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior - real scraping takes longer than test timeout

passed_tests: 18/19 backend API endpoints returning 200 status (94.7% success)
Dashboard page loads with 5173 REAL vessels from MarineTraffic
Real vessel names confirmed: SA OCEANIA, ORE ITALIA, BERGE EVEREST, HL VENUS
Map displays thousands of vessel markers in ASEAN region
Vessels page shows table with search functionality
Search for 'SA OCEANIA' returns correct filtered results
CSV Export button present and functional
Last extraction status: success with 5173 vessels in 32.85s
Bot start/stop controls present and functional
All navigation between pages working correctly
Vessel type and flag filters functional
Real-time data confirmed with proper ASEAN bounding box
